elements.text:
Create vector index
(Databricks calculates and
optionally saves embeddings)
elements.originalText:
Create vector index

optionally saves embeddings)

elements.text:
1.  Calculate query embeddings. Query can include metadata filters.
2.  Perform similarity search to identify most relevant documents.
3.  Return the most relevant documents.

2.  Perform similarity search to identify and return most relevant
     documents.
